S

setData(GameManager) - Method in class com.example.escritura_rapida.controller.ResultsController
Receives the game state from the previous screen.
setData(T) - Method in interface com.example.escritura_rapida.controller.DataReceiver
Receives data passed by the navigation manager.
setNavigationManager(NavigationManager) - Method in class com.example.escritura_rapida.controller.GameController
Receives the navigation manager after FXML load.

Receives the navigation manager after FXML load.

Injects the navigation manager after the FXML controller is created.
setNavigationManager(NavigationManager) - Method in class com.example.escritura_rapida.controller.ResultsController
Receives the navigation manager after FXML load.

Receives the navigation manager after FXML load.
setStage(Stage) - Method in class com.example.escritura_rapida.controller.GameController
Optional stage setter (not used by the navigation system).
setStats(GameManager) - Method in class com.example.escritura_rapida.controller.ResultsController
Populates the results UI with current stats.
setWords(List<String>) - Method in class com.example.escritura_rapida.model.WordRepository
Replaces the current word list.
show(String) - Method in class com.example.escritura_rapida.controller.NavigationManager
Shows a view identified by the route without passing data.
show(String, T) - Method in class com.example.escritura_rapida.controller.NavigationManager
Shows a view identified by the route and optionally passes data to the controller.
show(Stage, GameManager) - Method in class com.example.escritura_rapida.view.ResultsView
Loads the results view into the provided stage and injects stats.
start(Stage) - Method in class com.example.escritura_rapida.Main
JavaFX lifecycle hook for initial stage setup.
